creator: work+freebsd@vvv.kiev.ua
text:
When booting in UEFI mode after boot loader menu and 10 seconds countdown message appears: 'loading kernel...'. Then screen becomes black without cursor and system hangs. There is no '<<BOOT>>' message and there is no any disk activity.

Motherboard:   Intel DG45ID
BIOS version:  IDG4510H.86A.0135.2011.0225.1100
